headline: France's must-see art exhibitions this summer
subhead: Le Monde's critics present our selection of exhibitions on painting, contemporary art and photography across France.

War is undermining social contract between Putin and Russians
subhead: The spread of Ukrainian attacks across the country is deepening Russians' concerns about the regime's ability to protect their basic needs, as the economic situation deteriorates.

headline: Influencer Andrew Tate and brother Tristan arrested in Miami
subhead: The brothers, notorious for promoting aggressively misogynistic views to millions of their followers on social media, were arrested on Saturday by US marshals. The United Kingdom is seeking their extradition to face new charges of rape, sex trafficking and assault.

headline: In a world in turmoil, 'Hamlet' has never been more relevant
subhead: The very embodiment of choosing chaos over building a better future, the 16th-century Shakespearean character continues to inspire contemporary theater directors.

headline: How Dakar caught surfing's new wave: 'It has become a path to success and a way of life'
subhead: The Senegalese coast, with its small villages and beaches where Atlantic swells create powerful waves that draw surfers from around the world, has produced a new generation of young champions eager to ride. Every day, they take on the ocean at about 12 spots along this wild, little-known shoreline.

Elie Barnavi: 'Marwan Barghouti is the only one capable of uniting the Palestinian people around a national project and the two-state solution'
subhead: The former Israeli ambassador to France, in an op-ed for Le Monde, calls for the release of the Palestinian politician, who has been held in Israel since 2002. He argues that Barghouti has consistently championed the project of a sovereign Palestine living in peace alongside Israel.

headline: Argentina's thriving theater scene
subhead: Buenos Aires has emerged as the epicenter of Spanish-language theater, where a vibrant creative scene – both precarious and remarkably prolific – is defined by the generosity of its performances.

headline: Behind the scenes of Macron's last G7, as told by photographer Kamil Zihnioglu
subhead: There is protocol, and then there is Donald Trump. That, in essence, is what photographer Kamil Zihnioglu took away from his three days covering the G7 summit in Evian-les-Bains for Le Monde.
